puzzle.title: The Willing Sacrifice
puzzle.intro: In a time of divine tests, a soul was called to the ultimate act of submission. Raised in a barren land, this figure grew to embody faith and patience. When a vision commanded a sacrifice, they did not waver. Their story is a cornerstone of devotion.
clues: I was the answer to a long-awaited prayer of a great prophet.
My mother and I were left in a desolate valley with only provisions of dates and water.
I grew up to become a prophet known for my truthfulness and patience.
I helped my father raise the foundations of a sacred house dedicated to Allah.
When my father told me of a dream to sacrifice me, I replied, 'Do as you are commanded.'
Allah honored my submission by sending a ram from the sky to ransom me.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being thrown into a blazing fire
Being swallowed by a great fish
Being tested with a severe illness

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Was ransomed with a great ram
Was taken out of the whale
Was given a kingdom and wisdom
outcome.answer: Was ransomed with a great ram

puzzle.arabic: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَـٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
puzzle.verse: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allāh wills, of the steadfast." (37:102)
